caption: A man wearing a tall, grey, textured wig, glasses, and over-ear headphones sits in a studio setting. He is dressed in a white long-sleeved shirt with a red bow tie and gold suspenders. In front of him is a professional microphone. The background consists of a wall adorned with numerous framed photographs and a "LEE" branded garment rack. A logo that reads "BOSS TALK 101 PODCAST" appears on the left and right sides of the screen. Throughout the sequence, the man is speaking; he begins by looking forward, then shifts his gaze slightly to the side while gesturing with his hand. He briefly brings his hand up toward his face before returning to a posture where he continues speaking toward the microphone. The background and equipment remain static while the man's facial expressions and hand movements change.
